title: Debug Ticket & Enhanced Logging System
notes: Initial implementation completed 2026-01-26. Unified with OTEL/tracing pipeline 2026-01-27 per user request - removed standalone logging infrastructure in favor of tracing-subscriber with tracing-appender for file rotation.

phases.name: Logging Module Foundation
phases.notes: Unified: src/logging/mod.rs now re-exports from observability module instead of having separate config/formatter modules

tasks.title: Create logging module structure
tasks.description: Create src/logging/mod.rs as thin wrapper re-exporting from observability
acceptance_criteria: Re-exports LogConfig, LogFormat, LogLevel, Sanitizer from observability
Provides helper functions: default_log_directory, current_log_file, read_recent_logs, get_log_stats, clean_logs, format_size

tasks.title: Implement LogConfig
tasks.description: LogConfig defined in observability/logging.rs with level, format, filter, file, disable_file_logging fields
acceptance_criteria: LogConfig struct with level, format, filter, file, disable_file_logging
LogLevel enum: Quiet, Normal, Verbose, Debug, Trace

tasks.title: Implement log formatter
tasks.description: Handled by tracing-subscriber's built-in JSON and text formatters
acceptance_criteria: File layer uses JSON format via fmt::layer().json()
Console layer uses text or JSON based on config
Span events, targets, and timestamps included

phases.name: Log Writer & Rotation
phases.notes: Unified: Uses tracing-appender RollingFileAppender instead of custom writer/rotator

tasks.title: Implement file logging
tasks.description: Uses tracing-appender RollingFileAppender for file-based logging

tasks.title: Implement log rotation
tasks.description: Daily rotation via tracing-appender Rotation::DAILY
acceptance_criteria: No manual gzip compression (tracing-appender handles efficiently)

tasks.title: Implement age-based cleanup
tasks.description: Cleanup via clean_logs() function in src/logging/mod.rs

phases.name: Sanitization & Integration
phases.notes: Sanitizer already existed in observability module; re-exported through logging

tasks.title: Implement sanitizer
tasks.description: Sanitizer in src/observability/sanitizer.rs with comprehensive redaction patterns

tasks.title: Integrate with tracing-subscriber
tasks.description: init_debug_logging() creates multi-layer subscriber with file and console layers
acceptance_criteria: File layer writes JSON to log files

tasks.title: Export logging module
tasks.description: logging and observability modules exported from lib.rs
acceptance_criteria: LogConfig, LogLevel, LogFormat, Sanitizer publicly accessible

tasks.title: Add LogsAction enum to CLI
tasks.description: LogsAction subcommand enum with view, stats, clean, config variants

tasks.title: Create logs command handler
tasks.description: src/commands/logs_cmd.rs with handler function routing to subhandlers

tasks.title: Add main.rs command dispatch for logs
tasks.description: Logs command wired up in main.rs dispatch

tasks.title: Create ticket module structure
tasks.description: src/ticket/mod.rs with module declarations for collector and bundler

tasks.title: Implement system info collector
tasks.description: Collection of OS, arch, CPU, memory, shell, locale info

tasks.title: Implement tools status collector
tasks.description: Collection of package managers and configured tools status
acceptance_criteria: Get status of all configured tools
Include version, path, and any errors

tasks.title: Implement config and state collectors
tasks.description: Collection of jarvy config (sanitized) and environment state

tasks.title: Implement log and environment collectors
tasks.description: Collection of recent logs and environment variables
acceptance_criteria: Read last N lines from log files

tasks.title: Implement ZIP bundler
tasks.description: src/ticket/bundler.rs for creating ZIP archive with all collected data
acceptance_criteria: Include all collected data as JSON files

tasks.title: Add TicketAction enum to CLI
tasks.description: TicketAction subcommand enum with create, show, list, clean variants

tasks.title: Create ticket command handler
tasks.description: src/commands/ticket_cmd.rs with handler function routing
acceptance_criteria: Generate ticket with collection and bundling

tasks.title: Add main.rs command dispatch for ticket
tasks.description: Ticket command wired up in main.rs dispatch

tasks.title: Write logging and ticket tests
tasks.description: Unit tests for logging, sanitization, and ticket generation

non_goals: Real-time log streaming to external services
Automatic ticket submission to support systems
